subcodes.first_line: O Husayn! Hearken unto the call of Husayn, Who remaineth solitary among the servants and hath been imprisoned time after time through [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا حسین اسمع ندآء الحسین حین الذی بقی فریدا بین العباد و سجن مره بعد مره بما
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment, @call to action, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
